macro: Inflation did not add a fresh shock and oil panic eased, but the regime is still hostage to the oil→rates chain rather than safely risk-on.
policy: The March 17–18 FOMC window matters more now as a confirmation test: benign CPI helps, but any renewed oil spike would quickly re-tighten Fed/rates pressure.
delta: Published the 2026-03-12 morning digest, refreshed local watchlist/ticker state, and preserved a clear warning that all ticker pages remain provisional after a 15/15 fundamentals refresh failure.
